title: T-030 — brief + brief_lines tables (NPD-b schema) [PATCH: Brief→Project spine]
prompt:
# T-030 — brief + brief_lines schema

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §4.4, §9.1, §9.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create brief and brief_lines tables per §4.4 supporting both single_component and multi_component templates with 13 Section A + 24 Section B cols.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0030 emits brief (37+ cols), brief_lines (line_type, line_index, Section A + B cols + packaging_ext JSONB). FK brief_lines.brief_id → brief ON DELETE CASCADE. RLS. Drizzle schema entries.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0030_brief_and_lines.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/brief.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/brief-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0030 ran, when describing schema, then brief and brief_lines exist with FK CASCADE and RLS on both
2. Given a brief with 3 component lines, when DELETE brief, then all 3 brief_lines rows are deleted
3. Given two tenants, when querying brief, then RLS isolates rows per tenant

## Test strategy
- RED: tests for cascade and RLS
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test brief-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip cascade delete
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not commit C21-C37 placeholder labels (open item; use packaging_ext JSONB)

## 2026-05-03 E2E spine patch — Brief must link to NPD project
This task must make Brief the first artefact of the Stage-Gate spine, not a standalone FA/FG precursor. Add the minimum schema needed to link `brief` to `npd_projects` as canonical project record (`npd_project_id` FK or equivalent discovered relationship) and preserve compatibility aliases only where existing code requires them.

Final decisions:
- Canonical term is FG / Finished Good; FA may appear only as legacy alias.
- Brief creates/owns an NPD project such as `DEV-123` before any FG is created.
- FG creation/mapping happens at G3, not during initial brief creation.
- D365 is optional export/import only and not part of the Brief→Project contract.

pipeline_inputs.description: brief + brief_lines tables with section A/B columns + packaging_ext JSONB.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Migration creates both tables with FK CASCADE, RLS, Drizzle schemas exported. Tests cover cascade and tenant isolation.
Preserved acceptance requirements: Given a brief row exists, when queried, then it can be joined to exactly one canonical npd_project via npd_project_id or an equivalent non-null project link once created by T-031.; Given only a draft brief exists, when schema constraints are inspected, then no FG/product row is required before G3 mapping.; Given legacy FA fields/routes still exist, when schema comments or docs are generated, then they are marked compatibility aliases and not canonical release state.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Convert action here (T-033)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0030 ran, when describing schema, then brief and brief_lines exist with FK CASCADE and RLS on both
Given a brief with 3 component lines, when DELETE brief runs, then all 3 brief_lines rows are deleted
Given two tenants, when querying brief, then RLS isolates rows per tenant
Additional preserved requirements in details are implemented and covered by targeted tests.
test_strategy: RED: tests for cascade and RLS before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test brief-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not commit C21-C37 placeholder column names
Do not create or require FG/Product rows in the brief schema before G3.
Do not model D365 built/export state as the brief conversion target.
